---
title: "Personal"
comments: false
listing:
  contents: "20*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, date, categories]
---

This page is for the randomness in my head that refuses to fit neatly into the other categories: reflections, rabbit trails, rants, weird connections, and the occasional thought that showed up uninvited but made a compelling case for itself.
